data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields
    // XSIAM-injected metadata
    _time, _id, _insert_time, _vendor, _product,
    _reporting_device_ip, _reporting_device_name,
    _final_reporting_device_ip, _final_reporting_device_name,
    _tag, _raw_json, _raw_log,
    // OCSF taxonomy
    source_log_type, is_alert, message,
    activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name,
    type_uid,
    severity, severity_id,
    confidence, confidence_id,
    risk_level, risk_level_id,
    status, status_id,
    time, timezone_offset,
    // OCSF nested (raw JSON strings)
    finding_info, observables, resources, metadata,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — alert identity
    finding_uid, finding_title, finding_created_time, alert_type,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — item context
    item_id, item_type, alert_item_version,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — device context
    device_id, alert_hostname, device_last_seen, device_last_user,
    device_os_obs, device_serial,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — MCP-server specific
    mcp_package_name, mcp_package_type, mcp_transport,
    mcp_installation_method, mcp_url, mcp_risk_status
| comp count() as total_alert
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_alert scale_threshold("#919291","#ff0082","400") dataunit = "Alert"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count_distinct(device_id) as devices
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = devices scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Devices"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as items
| view graph type = single yaxis = items scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as mcp_servers
| view graph type = single yaxis = mcp_servers scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "MCP Servers"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Malicious Activity Detected"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as malicious_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = malicious_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Verified Hardcoded Secret"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as secret_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = secret_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Communication With Expired Domain"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as expired_domain_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = expired_domain_items scale_threshold("#ff8c00") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name contains "Vulnerability"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as cve_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = cve_items scale_threshold("#ff8c00") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| filter item_risk_level = "critical"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as critical_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = critical_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter package_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.package_name")
| filter package_name != null
| comp count_distinct(package_name) as packages
| view graph type = single yaxis = packages scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Packages"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter assessed = if(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_status") = "completed", 1, 0)
| comp avg(assessed) as cov
| alter coverage_pct = multiply(cov, 100)
| view graph type = single yaxis = coverage_pct scale_threshold("#00cc88") dataunit = "%"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| filter item_type = "mcp_server" and mcp_risk_status = "pending"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as pending_mcp
| view graph type = single yaxis = pending_mcp scale_threshold("#ff8c00") dataunit = "MCP Servers"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields
    // XSIAM-injected metadata
    _time, _id, _insert_time, _vendor, _product,
    _reporting_device_ip, _reporting_device_name,
    _final_reporting_device_ip, _final_reporting_device_name,
    _tag, _raw_json, _raw_log,
    // OCSF taxonomy
    source_log_type, is_alert, message,
    activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name,
    type_uid,
    severity, severity_id,
    confidence, confidence_id,
    risk_level, risk_level_id,
    status, status_id,
    time, timezone_offset,
    // OCSF nested (raw JSON strings)
    finding_info, observables, resources, metadata,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — alert identity
    finding_uid, finding_title, finding_created_time, alert_type,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — item context
    item_id, item_type, alert_item_version,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — device context
    device_id, alert_hostname, device_last_seen, device_last_user,
    device_os_obs, device_serial,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — MCP-server specific
    mcp_package_name, mcp_package_type, mcp_transport,
    mcp_installation_method, mcp_url, mcp_risk_status
| comp count() as alerts_by_severity by severity | sort desc alerts_by_severity
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "Alerts by Severity" xaxis = severity yaxis = alerts_by_severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by item_type
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Alerts by Item Type" xaxis = item_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by alert_type
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie header = "Alert Type" xaxis = alert_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as alerts by _time, severity
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Severity Trend" xaxis = _time yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_severity = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.severity")
| filter finding_severity != null
| comp count() as findings by finding_severity
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Finding Severity Mix" xaxis = finding_severity yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name != null
| comp count() as findings by finding_name
| sort desc findings
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Top Finding Types" xaxis = finding_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name in ("Unverified Publisher", "Individual Publisher", "Publisher Has Only One Item", "Publisher Low Install Count", "Low Install Count")
| comp count() as findings by finding_name
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Publisher Trust Signals" xaxis = finding_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name in ("Broad Host Permissions", "Code Execution Permissions", "Network Interception Permissions", "Identity & Authentication Permissions")
| comp count() as findings by finding_name
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = column header = "Risky Permission Findings" xaxis = finding_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name != null and marketplace != null
| comp count() as findings by marketplace, finding_name
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Finding Types by Marketplace" xaxis = marketplace yaxis = findings series = finding_name

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_severity = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.severity")
| filter finding_severity != null
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as findings by _time, finding_severity
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Findings Over Time by Severity" xaxis = _time yaxis = findings series = finding_severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_severity = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.severity")
| filter finding_severity != null and item_risk_level != null
| comp count() as findings by item_risk_level, finding_severity
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Finding Severity by Item Risk Level" xaxis = item_risk_level yaxis = findings series = finding_severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| filter item_risk_level != null
| comp count() as alerts by item_risk_level
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "Item Risk Level" xaxis = item_risk_level yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_status")
| filter item_risk_status != null
| comp count() as alerts by item_risk_status
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Risk Assessment Status" xaxis = item_risk_status yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter risk_score = to_number(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk"))
| filter risk_score != null
| alter risk_band = if(risk_score < 2, "0-2", risk_score < 4, "2-4", risk_score < 6, "4-6", risk_score < 8, "6-8", "8-10")
| comp count() as items by risk_band
| sort asc risk_band
| view graph type = column header = "Risk Score Distribution" xaxis = risk_band yaxis = items

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| filter marketplace != null
| comp count() as alerts by marketplace, item_risk_level
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Marketplace by Risk Level" xaxis = marketplace yaxis = alerts series = item_risk_level

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        risk_score = to_number(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk"))
| filter marketplace != null and risk_score != null
| comp avg(risk_score) as avg_risk by marketplace
| sort desc avg_risk
| view graph type = column header = "Avg Risk Score by Marketplace" xaxis = marketplace yaxis = avg_risk

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name != null
| comp count() as findings by item_name
| sort desc findings
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Items With Most Findings" xaxis = item_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter package_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.package_name")
| filter package_name != null
| comp count() as alerts by package_name
| sort desc alerts
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Top Packages by Alerts" xaxis = package_name yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter labels_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].labels")
| arrayexpand labels_arr
| alter category = json_extract_scalar(labels_arr, "$")
| filter category != null
| comp count() as items by category
| sort desc items
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Top Item Categories" xaxis = category yaxis = items

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter labels_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].labels")
| arrayexpand labels_arr
| alter category = json_extract_scalar(labels_arr, "$")
| filter category != null
| comp count() as alerts by category, severity
| sort desc alerts
| limit 40
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Category by Severity" xaxis = category yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace")
| filter marketplace != null
| comp count() as alerts by marketplace, device_os_obs
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Marketplace by OS" xaxis = marketplace yaxis = alerts series = device_os_obs

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        model_name  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| filter marketplace in ("ollama", "hugging_face")
| comp count() as alerts by model_name, marketplace
| sort desc alerts
| limit 15
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "AI Models by Alerts (Ollama / Hugging Face)" xaxis = model_name yaxis = alerts series = marketplace

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace")
| filter marketplace != null
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as alerts by _time, marketplace
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Marketplace Trend" xaxis = _time yaxis = alerts series = marketplace

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter first_seen = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[2].data.first_seen")
| filter first_seen != null
| alter first_seen_day = arrayindex(split(first_seen, "T"), 0)
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as new_items by first_seen_day
| sort asc first_seen_day
| view graph type = area header = "Newly Seen Items Over Time" xaxis = first_seen_day yaxis = new_items

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter device_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.status")
| filter device_status != null
| comp count() as alerts by device_status
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Device Status" xaxis = device_status yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by device_os_obs, severity
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Severity by OS" xaxis = device_os_obs yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by device_last_user
| sort desc alerts
| limit 10
| view graph type = pie subtype = full xaxis = device_last_user yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by alert_hostname, severity
| sort desc alerts
| limit 15
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Device Severity Concentration" xaxis = alert_hostname yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by mcp_type
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "MCP: Local vs Remote" xaxis = mcp_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by mcp_transport
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "MCP Transport" xaxis = mcp_transport yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| filter item_type = "mcp_server"
| alter install_method = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.installation_method")
| filter install_method != null
| comp count() as alerts by install_method
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "MCP Installation Method" xaxis = install_method yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by mcp_package_type
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie header = "MCP by Package Type" xaxis = mcp_package_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by item_id
| sort desc alerts
| limit 10
| view graph type = funnel show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` show_percentage = `false` xaxis = item_id yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as mcp_alerts by _time
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area header = "MCP Detections Over Time" xaxis = _time yaxis = mcp_alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_name       = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name"),
        marketplace      = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        package_name     = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.package_name"),
        item_risk_level  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level"),
        item_risk_score  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk")
| filter item_name != null
| fields _time, item_name, marketplace, package_name, item_risk_level, item_risk_score, severity, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name"),
        evidence = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.evidence.message")
| filter finding_name = "Malicious Activity Detected"
| fields _time, item_name, evidence, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter device_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.status"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name"),
        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level"),
        device_last_seen2 = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.last_seen")
| filter device_status = "stale" and item_risk_level = "critical"
| fields _time, alert_hostname, device_last_user, item_name, item_risk_level, device_last_seen2
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name"),
        item_version = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].version"),
        marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Unmaintained Item"
| fields _time, item_name, item_version, marketplace, alert_hostname
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields _time, finding_title, severity, item_id, item_type, alert_hostname, device_last_user, alert_type
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server" and severity in ("Critical", "High")
| fields _time, item_id, mcp_type, mcp_transport, mcp_risk_level, mcp_url, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by item_id
| sort desc alerts
| limit 10
| view graph type = funnel show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` show_percentage = `false` xaxis = item_id yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count() as alerts by mcp_type
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "MCP: Local vs Remote" xaxis = mcp_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by device_last_user
| sort desc alerts
| limit 10
| view graph type = pie subtype = full xaxis = device_last_user yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by alert_hostname, severity
| sort desc alerts
| limit 15
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Device Severity Concentration" xaxis = alert_hostname yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by device_os_obs, severity
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Severity by OS" xaxis = device_os_obs yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by alert_type
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie header = "Alert Type" xaxis = alert_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count() as alerts by item_type
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Alerts by Item Type" xaxis = item_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as alerts by _time, severity
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Severity Trend" xaxis = _time yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as mcp_alerts by _time
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area header = "MCP Detections Over Time" xaxis = _time yaxis = mcp_alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as items
| view graph type = single yaxis = items scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields
    // XSIAM-injected metadata
    _time, _id, _insert_time, _vendor, _product,
    _reporting_device_ip, _reporting_device_name,
    _final_reporting_device_ip, _final_reporting_device_name,
    _tag, _raw_json, _raw_log,
    // OCSF taxonomy
    source_log_type, is_alert, message,
    activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name,
    type_uid,
    severity, severity_id,
    confidence, confidence_id,
    risk_level, risk_level_id,
    status, status_id,
    time, timezone_offset,
    // OCSF nested (raw JSON strings)
    finding_info, observables, resources, metadata,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — alert identity
    finding_uid, finding_title, finding_created_time, alert_type,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — item context
    item_id, item_type, alert_item_version,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — device context
    device_id, alert_hostname, device_last_seen, device_last_user,
    device_os_obs, device_serial,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — MCP-server specific
    mcp_package_name, mcp_package_type, mcp_transport,
    mcp_installation_method, mcp_url, mcp_risk_status
| comp count() as alerts_by_severity by severity | sort desc alerts_by_severity
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "Alerts by Severity" xaxis = severity yaxis = alerts_by_severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| filter item_risk_level != null
| comp count() as alerts by item_risk_level
| sort desc alerts
| view graph type = pie subtype = full header = "Item Risk Level" xaxis = item_risk_level yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter labels_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].labels")
| arrayexpand labels_arr
| alter category = json_extract_scalar(labels_arr, "$")
| filter category != null
| comp count() as items by category
| sort desc items
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Top Item Categories" xaxis = category yaxis = items

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields
    // XSIAM-injected metadata
    _time, _id, _insert_time, _vendor, _product,
    _reporting_device_ip, _reporting_device_name,
    _final_reporting_device_ip, _final_reporting_device_name,
    _tag, _raw_json, _raw_log,
    // OCSF taxonomy
    source_log_type, is_alert, message,
    activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name,
    type_uid,
    severity, severity_id,
    confidence, confidence_id,
    risk_level, risk_level_id,
    status, status_id,
    time, timezone_offset,
    // OCSF nested (raw JSON strings)
    finding_info, observables, resources, metadata,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — alert identity
    finding_uid, finding_title, finding_created_time, alert_type,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — item context
    item_id, item_type, alert_item_version,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — device context
    device_id, alert_hostname, device_last_seen, device_last_user,
    device_os_obs, device_serial,
    // Parsing-rule promoted — MCP-server specific
    mcp_package_name, mcp_package_type, mcp_transport,
    mcp_installation_method, mcp_url, mcp_risk_status
| comp count() as total_alert
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_alert scale_threshold("#919291","#ff0082","400") dataunit = "Alert"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server" and severity in ("Critical", "High")
| fields _time, item_id, mcp_type, mcp_transport, mcp_risk_level, mcp_url, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts" and item_type = "mcp_server"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as mcp_servers
| view graph type = single yaxis = mcp_servers scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "MCP Servers"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")

| filter finding_severity != null
| comp count() as findings by finding_severity
| sort desc findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| comp count_distinct(device_id) as devices
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = devices scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Devices"

dataset = koi_koi_raw

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| fields _time, finding_title, severity, item_id, item_type, alert_hostname, device_last_user, alert_type

dataset = koi_koi_raw

| view graph type = pie header = "MCP by Package Type" xaxis = mcp_package_type yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw

| comp count() as alerts by mcp_transport
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "MCP Transport" xaxis = mcp_transport yaxis = alerts

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_status")
| filter item_risk_status != null

dataset = koi_koi_raw

        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")

| comp count() as alerts by marketplace, item_risk_level

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        model_name  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| filter marketplace in ("ollama", "hugging_face")
| comp count() as alerts by model_name, marketplace
| sort desc alerts
| limit 15
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "AI Models by Alerts (Ollama / Hugging Face)" xaxis = model_name yaxis = alerts series = marketplace

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_name       = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name"),
        marketplace      = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        package_name     = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.package_name"),
        item_risk_level  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level"),
        item_risk_score  = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk")
| filter item_name != null
| fields _time, item_name, marketplace, package_name, item_risk_level, item_risk_score, severity, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Malicious Activity Detected"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as malicious_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = malicious_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Verified Hardcoded Secret"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as secret_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = secret_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name = "Communication With Expired Domain"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as expired_domain_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = expired_domain_items scale_threshold("#ff8c00") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name contains "Vulnerability"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as cve_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = cve_items scale_threshold("#ff8c00") dataunit = "Items"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name in ("Broad Host Permissions", "Code Execution Permissions", "Network Interception Permissions", "Identity & Authentication Permissions")
| comp count() as findings by finding_name
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = column header = "Risky Permission Findings" xaxis = finding_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name in ("Unverified Publisher", "Individual Publisher", "Publisher Has Only One Item", "Publisher Low Install Count", "Low Install Count")
| comp count() as findings by finding_name
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Publisher Trust Signals" xaxis = finding_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name"),
        evidence = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.evidence.message")
| filter finding_name = "Malicious Activity Detected"
| fields _time, item_name, evidence, alert_hostname, device_last_user
| sort desc _time

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter risk_score = to_number(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk"))
| filter risk_score != null
| alter risk_band = if(risk_score < 2, "0-2", risk_score < 4, "2-4", risk_score < 6, "4-6", risk_score < 8, "6-8", "8-10")
| comp count() as items by risk_band
| sort asc risk_band
| view graph type = column header = "Risk Score Distribution" xaxis = risk_band yaxis = items

widgets_data.title: Koi Avg Risk Score by Marketplace

data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace"),
        risk_score = to_number(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk"))
| filter marketplace != null and risk_score != null
| comp avg(risk_score) as avg_risk by marketplace
| sort desc avg_risk
| view graph type = column header = "Avg Risk Score by Marketplace" xaxis = marketplace yaxis = avg_risk

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_name = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.finding_name")
| filter finding_name != null
| comp count() as findings by item_name
| sort desc findings
| limit 15
| view graph type = column header = "Items With Most Findings" xaxis = item_name yaxis = findings

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter device_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.status")
| filter device_status != null
| comp count() as alerts by device_status
| view graph type = pie subtype = donut header = "Device Status" xaxis = device_status yaxis = alerts

widgets_data.title: Koi Stale Devices With Critical Items

data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter device_status = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.status"),
        item_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].name"),
        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level"),
        device_last_seen2 = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[1].data.last_seen")
| filter device_status = "stale" and item_risk_level = "critical"
| fields _time, alert_hostname, device_last_user, item_name, item_risk_level, device_last_seen2
| sort desc _time

widgets_data.title: Koi Finding Severity by Item Risk Level

data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings"),
        item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_severity = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.severity")
| filter finding_severity != null and item_risk_level != null
| comp count() as findings by item_risk_level, finding_severity
| sort desc findings
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Finding Severity by Item Risk Level" xaxis = item_risk_level yaxis = findings series = finding_severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter labels_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].labels")
| arrayexpand labels_arr
| alter category = json_extract_scalar(labels_arr, "$")
| filter category != null
| comp count() as alerts by category, severity
| sort desc alerts
| limit 40
| view graph type = column subtype = stacked header = "Category by Severity" xaxis = category yaxis = alerts series = severity

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter marketplace = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.marketplace")
| filter marketplace != null
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as alerts by _time, marketplace
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Marketplace Trend" xaxis = _time yaxis = alerts series = marketplace

widgets_data.title: Koi Findings Over Time by Severity

data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter findings_arr = json_extract_array(resources, "$[0].data.findings.findings")
| arrayexpand findings_arr
| alter finding_severity = json_extract_scalar(findings_arr, "$.severity")
| filter finding_severity != null
| bin _time span = 1d
| comp count() as findings by _time, finding_severity
| sort asc _time
| view graph type = area subtype = stacked header = "Findings Over Time by Severity" xaxis = _time yaxis = findings series = finding_severity

widgets_data.title: Koi Newly Seen Items Over Time

data.phrase:
dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter first_seen = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[2].data.first_seen")
| filter first_seen != null
| alter first_seen_day = arrayindex(split(first_seen, "T"), 0)
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as new_items by first_seen_day
| sort asc first_seen_day
| view graph type = area header = "Newly Seen Items Over Time" xaxis = first_seen_day yaxis = new_items

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter assessed = if(json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_status") = "completed", 1, 0)
| comp avg(assessed) as cov
| alter coverage_pct = multiply(cov, 100)
| view graph type = single yaxis = coverage_pct scale_threshold("#00cc88") dataunit = "%"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter package_name = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.package_name")
| filter package_name != null
| comp count_distinct(package_name) as packages
| view graph type = single yaxis = packages scale_threshold("#0054f5") dataunit = "Packages"

dataset = koi_koi_raw
| filter source_log_type = "Alerts"
| alter item_risk_level = json_extract_scalar(resources, "$[0].data.risk_level")
| filter item_risk_level = "critical"
| comp count_distinct(item_id) as critical_items
| view graph type = single yaxis = critical_items scale_threshold("#ff0082") dataunit = "Items"
